A trend is a recurring CONTENT PATTERN or USER DISCOURSE on XHS. Look at the post titles and identify: (1) What topics are XHS users creating content about repeatedly? (2) What debates or opinions are forming? (3) What aesthetic or styling content is gaining traction? (4) What purchase behaviors or unboxing patterns are emerging?
